heading: Acting as agent for nonmember bank in getting discounts from reserve bank
label: 374 Acting as agent for nonmember bank in getting discounts from reserve bank
text: No member bank shall act as the medium or agent of a nonmember bank in applying for or receiving discounts from a Federal reserve bank under the provisions of this chapter, except by permission of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Federal Reserve Act.
